summary: Added Aliases: []string{"geocode"} to the spec-derived `free` command so users can also invoke it as `geocode`.
reason: The spec's operationId yields `free` but the agent-natural and research-aligned name is `geocode`. Adding an alias keeps the spec-derived name while exposing the natural name. README quickstart and SKILL trigger phrases all use `geocode`.
validated_outcome: `pdok-location-pp-cli geocode --q ... --rows 1 --json` returns the same response as `free`.
